Question:
Weight of a baby Mackenzie recorded her baby’s weight every two months. The baby’s age, in months, and weight, in pounds, are listed in the table, and shown as an ordered pair in the third column. ⓐ Plot the points on a coordinate grid. \begin{table}[h]
\centering
\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|}
\hline
$$\text{Age}$$ & $$\text{Weight}$$ & $$( x , y )$$ \\ \hline
$$0$$ & $$7$$ & $$( 0 , 7 )$$ \\ \hline
$$2$$ & $$11$$ & $$( 2 , 11 )$$ \\ \hline
$$4$$ & $$15$$ & $$( 4 , 15 )$$ \\ \hline
$$6$$ & $$16$$ & $$( 6 , 16 )$$ \\ \hline
$$8$$ & $$19$$ & $$( 8 , 19 )$$ \\ \hline
$$10$$ & $$20$$ & $$( 10 , 20 )$$ \\ \hline
$$12$$ & $$21$$ & $$( 12 , 21 )$$ \\ \hline
\end{tabular}
\end{table} ⓑ Why is only Quadrant I needed?
Answer: ⓐ ⓑ Age and weight are only positive.

Question:
Weight of a child Latresha recorded her son’s height and weight every year. His height, in inches, and weight, in pounds, are listed in the table, and shown as an ordered pair in the third column. ⓐ Plot the points on a coordinate grid. \begin{table}[h]
\centering
\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|}
\hline
$$\left .\begin{matrix}{a}\text{Height} \\ x\end{matrix}\right .$$ & $$\left .\begin{matrix}{a}\text{Weight} \\ y\end{matrix}\right .$$ & $$\left .\begin{matrix}{} \\ ( x , y )\end{matrix}\right .$$ \\ \hline
$$28$$ & $$22$$ & $$( 28 , 22 )$$ \\ \hline
$$31$$ & $$27$$ & $$( 31 , 27 )$$ \\ \hline
$$33$$ & $$33$$ & $$( 33 , 33 )$$ \\ \hline
$$37$$ & $$35$$ & $$( 37 , 35 )$$ \\ \hline
$$40$$ & $$41$$ & $$( 40 , 41 )$$ \\ \hline
$$42$$ & $$45$$ & $$( 42 , 45 )$$ \\ \hline
\end{tabular}
\end{table} ⓑ Why is only Quadrant I needed?
